stemHtml: During a flight to Europe, scheduled in MNPS airspace, you expect to cross the 30°W meridian at 03:00 UTC. You will normally be…

options.a: in a day-time organised track system.
options.b: in a night-time organised track system.
options.c: unable to use this schedule and have to select another take-off time.
options.d: outside the validity period of the organised track system.
